column3: and motor speed omega is in RAD/S.

column1: # Values are CALIBRATED static coefficients in this rad/s convention
# aerospace-standard CT(n) with n in revolutions/sec. To convert to standard:
#   CT_aero = ct_static * (2*pi)^2 ~ 39.5x larger
# Calibration anchors each prop size to a typical-KV build that's been
# flight-tested in HITL. The 5"x4.5"x3 racing prop (BuildSpec::default at
# KV 1700) is the master anchor — its kt matches the legacy from_build_specs
# value within 0.1%. Other sizes anchor via per-size reference KV chosen to
# keep the reference-build hover-throttle gates passing.

#   - Blade count: piecewise table {1:0.55

# Source column lists the manufacturer page or bench-test report consulted for
# the (D
column3: B) ratio relationships. Numerical values are derived from those
